locations.name: Bridgewater Café
locations.description: A small independent café on a busy corner, popular with locals — equal parts breakfast spot, freelancer office, and afternoon meet-up.

rooms.name: Main room
rooms.description: The interior of the café — counter on the left with espresso machine and pastry case, a long shared table down the middle, window booths and a small back nook with armchairs.
rooms.image_prompt_day: A cozy independent café interior, exposed brick wall on one side, polished concrete floor, a long communal oak table down the middle with mismatched chairs, a counter on the left with a chrome espresso machine and a glass pastry case, a chalkboard menu above, plants hanging from copper pipes, big window booths with worn leather benches, warm morning light streaming in, cinematic photo, no people, no text
rooms.image_prompt_night: The same café interior at night, warm pendant lamps over the communal table, the espresso machine quiet and gleaming, the chalkboard menu lit by a single spotlight, soft jazz feel, cinematic photo, no people, no text

rooms.name: Terrace
rooms.description: A small outdoor seating area on the corner, three round bistro tables with green chairs under the awning, a low planter of herbs along the curb.
rooms.image_prompt_day: A small café terrace on a European street corner, three round bistro tables with mismatched green metal chairs, a green awning overhead, a low wooden planter of basil and mint along the edge, a chalkboard with the day's special leaning against the wall, late morning sun and dappled shade, cinematic photo, no people, no text
rooms.image_prompt_night: The same terrace at night, the bistro tables lit by string lights woven through the awning, a single candle in a small jar on each table, the cobblestones wet from a recent rain reflecting the lights, cinematic photo, no people, no text

locations.image_prompt_day: A small independent corner café in a European city, large windows facing the street, warm wood storefront with a hand-painted sign reading 'BRIDGEWATER', a few outdoor tables under a green awning, two bicycles leaning against the wall, late morning light, cinematic photo, no people, no text
locations.image_prompt_night: The same small corner café at night, warm amber light spilling from the windows onto the cobblestones, neon 'open' sign glowing above the door, a single street lamp casting soft pools of light, the awning rolled up, cinematic photo, no people, no text
locations.image_prompt_map: A small iso icon of a café with a steaming coffee cup over a green awning on a white circular background, simple flat illustration, no text

locations.name: Hale Residence
locations.description: A modest two-story suburban home where Marcus lives. Quiet street, mature oak in the front yard, a covered motorcycle in the driveway.

rooms.name: Living room
rooms.description: A lived-in living room with worn leather sofa, a guitar in the corner, an old coffee table covered in books and rings from coffee mugs.
rooms.image_prompt_day: A lived-in middle-class suburban living room interior, warm wood floors, a worn brown leather sofa, an old wooden coffee table with a half-read book and a coffee mug, a dark wood bookshelf along one wall filled with nonfiction and a small motorcycle helmet on top, a vintage acoustic guitar leaned in the corner, soft afternoon light coming through linen curtains, cinematic photo, no people, no text
rooms.image_prompt_night: A lived-in middle-class suburban living room at night, a single warm floor lamp by the sofa illuminating the room, the rest in soft shadow, a glass of whiskey on the side table, the kitchen visible in the background with a small under-cabinet light, cinematic photo, no people, no text

locations.image_prompt_day: A modest two-story detached suburban house, brick lower floor and beige siding upper floor, well-kept lawn, a single mature oak tree, gravel driveway with a covered car port and the silhouette of a motorcycle under a tarp, dark green front door with a small porch, late afternoon warm sunlight, cinematic photo, no people, no text
locations.image_prompt_night: A modest two-story detached suburban house at night, warm interior lights glowing through curtained windows, a porch lantern lit, the silhouette of a covered motorcycle in the driveway, cool moonlight on the lawn, cinematic photo, no people, no text
locations.image_prompt_map: A small icon of a friendly two-story suburban house with a green door on a white circular background, simple flat illustration, no text

locations.name: High-rise building

rooms.name: Apartment 506
rooms.image_prompt_day: one room apartment in a high-rise tower a the 5. level, room has a small kitchen, a bed and a door to the sperate bathroom.
rooms.image_prompt_night: one room apartment in a high-rise tower a the 5. level, room has a small kitchen, a bed and a door to the sperate bathroom by night

rooms.name: Apartment 1207
rooms.description: Amelia's minimalist high-rise apartment on the 12th floor with floor-to-ceiling windows facing the city skyline.
rooms.image_prompt_day: A modern minimalist high-rise apartment interior, floor-to-ceiling windows with a sweeping view of the city skyline, polished concrete floor, a low slate-grey sectional sofa, a glass dining table with two designer chairs, an open kitchen with matte black cabinets and a single brushed-metal pendant lamp, a pair of running shoes set neatly by the door, a stack of nonfiction books on a side table, late afternoon sunlight cutting across the room, cinematic photo, no people, no text
rooms.image_prompt_night: A modern minimalist high-rise apartment interior at night, the city skyline glittering through floor-to-ceiling windows, a single low warm lamp on a side table, the rest of the room in cool blue shadow, a glass of red wine on the coffee table, soft city light reflecting on the polished concrete floor, cinematic photo, no people, no text

locations.image_prompt_day: a typical high-rise building at the city by day
locations.image_prompt_night: a typical high-rise building at the city by night
